strategy: Belloq punishes your setup: each Trap you cast puts an Elemental Trap back on you, and each Blade you cast gives him a Balanceblade, so keep your buffing minimal and efficient.
He resists Balance 35% and takes 35% more from Myth, Life, and Death, so attack with one of those schools.
Prefer enchanted single blades over long trap chains, then hit before he stacks Balanceblades.
Expect a Scald damage-over-time at some point; pack Triage if the tick threatens you.
cheatNotes: Belloq opens the fight with Power Play as a Global.
Cast a Trap and he answers with Elemental Trap on you, the caster.
Cast a Blade and he gives himself a Balanceblade.
He will cast Scald on you at some point; the exact trigger is unknown.
